notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Timing diagnostics showed main.home renderMs around 5.6-6.6s while deliveryMs was only around 0.1-0.3s.
Root cause: accessManager.filterSections called account lookup per section, causing repeated account ensure and DB queries during menu render.
accessManager.filterSections now loads account once per menu render and evaluates all sections in memory.
accountManager now uses short in-memory cache for account lookups and ensure() metadata.
/debug/core-timings remains available for comparing renderMs before and after this optimization.
Next migration step: redeploy, verify batchedAccessRenderReady=true, send Core menu, click sections and Главная/Главное меню, then open /debug/core-timings?limit=10.
